bk_tools.gui.title: BKTools Settings - %s
bk_tools.config.generic.comment.openGuiC: Hotkey to open the BKTools config screen
bk_tools.config.generic.comment.force_de: Enable debug mode manually. Shows TEST tab and detailed logs. Saved to config.
bk_tools.config.test.comment.bktools_say:
Press to show 'Hello World! BKTools is working!' message
Also can execute by the malilib custom command: §c/bk hello
bk_tools.config.cn2tw.comment.cn2tw_enab:
When ZH-TW translation is missing, fall back to ZH-CN
Enabling immediately refreshes the map; disabling clears it
Use the three buttons below to manage resources manually
bk_tools.config.cn2tw.comment.cn2tw_refr:
Asynchronously reload language files and update the in-memory fallback map
No file output, lightest operation — suitable for frequent use
bk_tools.config.cn2tw.comment.cn2tw_dump:
Refresh fallback data then write JSON to config/BKTools_DEBUG/
Grouped by namespace for easy review of missing translations
bk_tools.config.cn2tw.comment.cn2tw_relo:
Equivalent to F3+T — reloads all resource packs, then CN2TW auto-updates
Has a longer cooldown (10s) — avoid frequent use
